questions.text: After watching these ads, which telecom brand are you most likely to consider for your next subscription or upgrade?
options: None / Will stay with current provider
questions.rationale: Captures purchase intent and competitive pull-through, which is missing despite measuring ad likeability and recall.

questions.text: In your own words, what is the main message or feeling you took away from the Etisalat ads you saw?
questions.rationale: An open-ended brand-message takeaway reveals unaided perceptions beyond the structured offer-recall questions.

questions.text: Which telecom provider are you currently using as your main mobile line?
questions.rationale: Current provider context is missing and is essential for interpreting ad likeability and switching intent.

questions.text: What did you like or dislike most about the Etisalat ads, and what would you change about them?
questions.rationale: Open feedback uncovers specific creative strengths and weaknesses beyond the structured likeability scores.

questions.text: Which telecom operator are you currently using as your primary mobile line?
questions.rationale: Establishes the current operator base needed to measure migration patterns and benchmark switching intent.

questions.text: How likely are you to switch your mobile operator in the next 6 months?
questions.rationale: Directly measures switching intent, a core KPI missing from the current ad-focused questionnaire.

questions.text: In your own words, what would make you switch from your current telecom operator to another one?
questions.rationale: Captures unprompted switching triggers (price, network, offers, service) to guide Etisalat's acquisition strategy.

questions.text: In your own words, what makes a telecom ad memorable or convincing to you?
questions.rationale: Captures spontaneous consumer insight on ad effectiveness drivers, useful for guiding future creative direction.

questions.text: How likely are you to switch your current mobile operator to another one in the next 6 months?
questions.rationale: Directly measures switching intent, a core KPI for competitive benchmarking across operators.

questions.text: Which factors would most likely push you to switch to a different telecom operator?
questions.rationale: Identifies key switching triggers to help prioritize competitive positioning and ad messaging.

questions.text: In your own words, what is the main reason that stops you from switching to another telecom operator?
questions.rationale: Captures unprompted switching barriers (loyalty, number portability, family plans) that closed questions may miss.
